recipe.title: Poppyseed Chicken Casserole
ingredients: 8 oz mushrooms (sliced), 1 medium onion (diced), 2 cloves garlic
8 oz cream cheese (softened), 1 cup sour cream
1 cup chicken broth, 2 tbsp poppy seeds
steps: Cook rice: bring 2 cups water + 1 tsp salt to boil, add rice, reduce to simmer, cover 18 min.
Season chicken with salt + pepper. Bake/pan-sear until cooked through. Shred or dice. Set aside.
Sauté mushrooms + onion in butter until soft, add garlic 30 sec.
Mix cream cheese, sour cream, chicken broth, poppy seeds, garlic powder.
Combine chicken, rice, mushroom mixture, sauce in large bowl. Pour into 9×13" baking dish.
